met.location: MSB cupboard, ground floor plant room

circuits.compliance_note: Zs 6.9× Zs_max — IEC 60364-4-41:2017 §411.4.7 (TN automatic disconnection) cannot be met by OCPD alone; add 300 mA Type A time-delayed RCD per §411.4.9(b) on this MSB feeder to satisfy ADS. Selective coordination with downstream DB-level RCDs requires a flagged upstream device on F01 itself.
Zs 10.8× Zs_max — IEC 60364-4-41:2017 §411.4.7 cannot be met by 400 A Type D MCCB alone; add 300 mA Type A time-delayed RCD per §411.4.9(b) at the MSB feeder.
Zs 7.0× Zs_max — IEC 60364-4-41:2017 §411.4.7 cannot be met by OCPD alone; add 300 mA Type A time-delayed RCD per §411.4.9(b) at the MSB feeder to F03.

Zs 2.5× Zs_max — IEC 60364-4-41:2017 §411.4.7 cannot be met by 63 A Type C MCB alone. Although IEC 60364-5-56 §560 permits availability priority for life-safety circuits, ADS must still be present. Provide 30 mA Type A RCD with monitored continuity per §411.4.9(b); the omission was the original C1 defect.

non_compliance_flags.message: F01-F03 LV_power feeders flagged fail_needs_rcd: Zs exceeds OCPD-only Zs_max by 6.9×-10.8× (Ze=0.30Ω + Type D MCCB Ia=20·In yields Zs_max ≤0.046Ω). Add 300 mA Type A time-delayed RCDs at the MSB level per IEC 60364-4-41 §411.4.9(b) — selective coordination with downstream DB-level devices cannot substitute for ADS at the MSB feeder itself.

F04 fire-alarm feeder flagged fail_needs_rcd: Zs 2.5× Zs_max. IEC 60364-5-56 §560 prioritises availability but does NOT exempt life-safety circuits from automatic disconnection — ADS must still be provided. Specify 30 mA Type A RCD with monitored continuity per §411.4.9(b).

assumptions: TN-C-S adopted (commercial typical with utility PEN bond, Ze=0.30Ω). The v1.2 version of this example was named intl-rural-tt but the content was always TN-C-S; renamed to intl-rural-tncs in Sprint A.1 (C1 cause-fix). A genuine TT example will be authored at the freed intl-rural-tt/ slot in Sprint C.1.

C1 Sprint A.1 cause-fix: F01-F04 previously reported zs_compliance="pass" with rcd_required=false, but Zs exceeded OCPD-only Zs_max by 2.5×-10.8×. Fixed per BS 7671 Reg 411.4.7 / IEC 60364-4-41 §411.4.7 — automatic disconnection cannot be met by OCPD alone and 300 mA / 30 mA Type A RCDs are required at the MSB feeder level per §411.4.9(b).
Cable resistance values for Zs are LLM-estimates using standard 70°C Cu conductor data (IEC 60228 / Eland tables). Deterministic refinement via calc.zs_loop_impedance is deferred per WI3.

flags: TOOL-CALL-PENDING:calc.zs_loop_impedance — Zs values are LLM-estimates; deterministic refinement deferred per WI3.

rationale.chat_summary: TN-C-S earthing for an INT commercial multi-tenant MSB on a utility PEN-bonded supply (Ze=0.30Ω). MET in the MSB cupboard with 70mm² main earthing conductor; 35mm² bonds to incoming water and gas, 25mm² to structural steel. Four MSB feeders (F01-F03 LV_power to lighting/power/mechanical sub-DBs, F04 fire-alarm to DB-FA1). C1 Sprint A.1 cause-fix: F01-F04 flagged fail_needs_rcd because Zs exceeds OCPD-only Zs_max by 2.5×-10.8×; 300 mA / 30 mA Type A RCDs required at MSB level per IEC 60364-4-41 §411.4.9(b). CPCs sized per IEC 60364-5-54 §543.1.2 (S/2 rule for S>16mm²). Reply to refine, e.g. 'specify time-delayed 300mA RCD on F01-F03'.

sections.title: Earthing System
sections.summary: TN-C-S adopted because the utility supplies a PEN bond at the service transformer (Ze=0.30Ω). Within the building, N and PE are separated downstream of the MSB.

decisions.label: TN-C-S system confirmed
decisions.summary: Utility declared PEN bond with Ze=0.30Ω; commercial typical.
decisions.rule: Ontology TN-C-S entry permitted for INT

sections.title: Main Earthing Terminal
sections.summary: MET in MSB cupboard, ground-floor plant room. 70mm² Cu main earthing conductor sized per IEC 60364-5-54 §542.3 (sized against the largest line conductor in the installation, F02 at 240mm² → CPC 120mm²; MET conductor sized to match the heaviest bonding requirement and the building-wide aggregate fault path).

decisions.label: MET location at MSB cupboard
decisions.summary: Co-located with the main switchboard for short bond runs and inspector access.

inputs.met_location: MSB cupboard, ground floor plant room

decisions.label: 70mm² Cu main earthing conductor
decisions.summary: Sized to handle the aggregate fault current path back to the supply earth.

sections.title: Electrodes
sections.summary: No supplementary electrode installed — utility provides the system earth via PEN bond. Optional auxiliary electrode could be added if site demands lightning protection (not declared here).

sections.title: Main Bonding
sections.summary: Three main protective bonds from MET to extraneous-conductive-parts: incoming water, incoming gas, and main column structural steel.

decisions.label: 35mm² Cu to water and gas services
decisions.summary: Sized per IEC 60364-5-54 Clause 544.1 ≥ half of largest line CSA (240mm²/2 = 120mm² cap; 35mm² adequate for service entry).

decisions.label: 25mm² Cu to structural steel
decisions.summary: Structural steel bonded at MSB cupboard; sized adequate for fault-energy dissipation.

sections.title: Supplementary Bonding
sections.summary: No supplementary bonding zones declared at the MSB itself. Each downstream sub-DB (DB-L1, DB-P1, DB-M1) will declare its own supplementary bonding requirements per zone.

sections.title: CPC + Zs Verification
sections.summary: CPCs sized per IEC 60364-5-54 §543.1.2 (adiabatic / S/2 rule) for the LV_power feeders (S>16mm²) and per Table 54.2 for the fire-alarm feeder (S=16mm²). Zs computed inline using 70°C Cu cable resistance data shows all four MSB feeders exceed OCPD-only Zs_max — each is flagged fail_needs_rcd and requires RCD supplementation at the MSB level.

decisions.label: CPC sizing rule S/2 for S>16mm² (F01-F03)
decisions.summary: Adiabatic-equivalent simplification — IEC 60364-5-54 §543.1.2 permits CPC = S/2 for S>16mm² in copper.

decisions.label: Zs exceeds OCPD-only Zs_max on F01-F04 — fail_needs_rcd
decisions.summary: With Ze=0.30Ω and Type D MCCBs (Ia=20·In), Zs_max is ≤0.046Ω which the feeder cable alone cannot meet on F01-F03; F04 fire-alarm at 0.466 > 0.183 also fails. OCPD alone cannot achieve §411.4.7 disconnection time; RCDs required per §411.4.9(b) (C1 Sprint A.1 cause-fix).
decisions.rule: IEC 60364-4-41 §411.4.7 — TN automatic disconnection; §411.4.9(b) — RCD-protected supplement when OCPD path insufficient

sections.title: RCD Requirements
sections.summary: All four MSB feeders require RCDs at the MSB level — F01-F03 take 300 mA Type A time-delayed for selectivity with downstream final-circuit RCDs; F04 takes 30 mA Type A for life-safety ADS. The prior v1.3 "selective coordination via downstream RCDs only" rationale was the C1 false-pass defect: per IEC 60364-4-41 §411.4.7 ADS must be achieved at the protective device of each circuit, not delegated downstream.

decisions.label: 300 mA Type A time-delayed RCD at MSB level on F01-F03
decisions.summary: Time-delayed (S-type) 300 mA RCD provides ADS at the MSB feeder while remaining selective with downstream 30 mA / 100 mA RCDs at DB-L1/DB-P1/DB-M1 per IEC 60364-5-53 selectivity guidance.
decisions.rule: IEC 60364-4-41 §411.4.9(b) — RCD supplement for ADS; IEC 60364-5-53 — selectivity

decisions.label: 30 mA Type A RCD on F04 fire-alarm feeder
decisions.summary: IEC 60364-5-56 §560 prioritises availability but does not exempt life-safety circuits from ADS. A 30 mA Type A RCD with monitored continuity satisfies §411.4.9(b) while a continuity monitor + intumescent containment preserve service availability.
decisions.rule: IEC 60364-4-41 §411.4.9(b); IEC 60364-5-56 §560 — life-safety availability with monitored ADS

sections.title: Compliance
sections.summary: Not compliant as drawn — four critical non-compliance flags raised against F01-F04 (fail_needs_rcd). Adding the four MSB-level RCDs (300 mA on F01-F03, 30 mA on F04) per §411.4.9(b) clears the flags. One TOOL-CALL-PENDING for deterministic Zs refinement remains.

sections.title: Assumptions
sections.summary: Three assumptions captured: TN-C-S re-anchor with folder renamed from intl-rural-tt to intl-rural-tncs in Sprint A.1 (C1 cause-fix); the four MSB feeders fail OCPD-only ADS and require RCD supplementation per §411.4.9(b); LLM-estimated cable resistance values pending deterministic refinement.
